body.visualDesc: Extreme close-up of a smooth pale-cream egg nestled in dark garden soil among tiny green carrot tops. The egg has tipped onto its side. CRITICAL: the egg is PERFECTLY SMOOTH and COMPLETELY UNCRACKED - absolutely NO cracks, NO lines, NO damage anywhere on the shell (the hatching has not started yet). Pip's round face peeks up from the bottom of the frame, her eyes enormous with wonder, beak parted in a gasp, one wing gripping the soil edge. Warm early-morning light, soft dew on the leaves.
